zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Bourgogne於1142年4月2日出生在英國諾福爾可波 可特 艾爾善姆時，她的父親John Ponchard30歲，母親de Burgh of Norfolk34歲。她於大約1157年與Walter de Burgh在英國諾福爾可波 可特 艾爾善姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1173年7月3日在英國諾福爾可享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Bourgogne于1142年4月2日出生在英国諾福爾可波 可特 艾爾善姆时，她的父亲John Ponchard30岁，母亲de Burgh of Norfolk34岁。她于大约1157年与Walter de Burgh在英国諾福爾可波 可特 艾爾善姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1173年7月3日在英国諾福爾可享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Bourgogne was born on 2 April 1142, in Burgh next Aylsham, Norfolk, England, her father, John Ponchard, was 30 and her mother, de Burgh of Norfolk, was 34. She married Walter de Burgh about 1157, in Burgh next Aylsham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died on 3 July 1173, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 31.

Elle a épousé Walter de Burgh environ 1157, à Burgh next Aylsham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1173, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans.

ko.Burgh Next Aylsham, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 버그h 니스트 아이샤
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Bourgogne(이)가 1142년 4월 2일 영국 노르폴크 버그h 니스트 아이샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Ponchard(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 de Burgh of Norfolk(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1157년 영국 노르폴크 버그h 니스트 아이샤에서 Walter de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년 7월 3일 영국 노르폴크에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Burgh Next Aylsham, Norfolk, England: бург некст аилшам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Bourgogne родилась 2 апреля 1142 г. в местности бург некст аилшам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Ponchard было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали de Burgh of Norfolk, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Burgh около 1157 г. в местности бург некст аилшам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла 3 июля 1173 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 31 год.
